artPrompt: An ornate hero shot of a single worn brass arcade token resting on dark felt, its blank embossed face catching hot-gold firelight, soft reflections of red and black lights smeared across its surface, drifting ember sparks and a hazy lurid-neon midway dissolving behind, the small coin glowing with tender worthless allure, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Penny Arcade Token
text:
{T}, Sacrifice Penny Arcade Token: Add {B} or {R}.
{1}, {T}: Flip a coin. If you win the flip, draw a card. If you lose the flip, it was only a penny.
flavorText: Not legal tender anywhere. Accepted everywhere on the midway.
